title: equisetum sylvaticum f. capillare
intro: Equisetum sylvaticum f. capillare, also known as field horsetail, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Equisetaceae family, characterized by its tall, green, and feathery stems. The medicinal properties of Equisetum sylvaticum f. capillare include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and arthritis, as well as its ability to improve digestion and boost immune function. Equisetum sylvaticum f. capillare can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
